---
title: "Commands"
---

The extension contributes these commands; all are available from the Command
Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`).

| Command                       | ID                       | Description                                  |
|-------------------------------|--------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Now Playing: Next             | `nowPlaying.next`        | Skip to the next track.                      |
| Now Playing: Previous         | `nowPlaying.prev`        | Skip to the previous track.                  |
| Now Playing: Focus Player     | `nowPlaying.raise`       | Raise the player window (MPRIS `Raise`).     |
| Now Playing: Refresh          | `nowPlaying.refresh`     | Restart the sidecar and refetch state.       |

## Keybindings

Bind any command from `keybindings.json`:

```json
[
  { "key": "ctrl+alt+right", "command": "nowPlaying.next" },
  { "key": "ctrl+alt+left",  "command": "nowPlaying.prev" }
]
```

## Status bar

- Click the **track title** to run `nowPlaying.raise` and focus the player.
- The prev/next buttons appear when
  [`nowPlaying.showControls`](configuration.qmd) is enabled.
- Hover the title to see album, player, status, and album art.
